description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a full set of camouflage-patterned clothing, including a long-sleeved jacket and matching pants. The figure has a muscular build and stands with arms extended horizontally, suggesting a neutral or T-pose. The face is clean-shaven with a stern expression, and the head is closely cropped. The hands are bare, and the feet are clad in sturdy, high-ankle boots suitable for outdoor or rugged environments. The overall appearance is that of a person prepared for urban or tactical scenarios, with no visible accessories or carried items. The clothing fits snugly, emphasizing the figure's athletic physique.
description: A muscular adult male in camouflage-patterned jacket and pants, standing with arms outstretched and wearing high-ankle boots. The figure has a close-cropped hairstyle and a stern facial expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, chest, and outstretched arms, highlighting the camouflage jacket and pants.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the profile of the head, the arm extended forward, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the head, jacket, and pants, with both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view with the profile of the head, arm, and the side of the boots visible.
attribute_clothing_type: military-style camouflage jacket and pants with a fitted cut
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
